title: Days disappear
description: A brief domestic time-note about ordinary days returning, pop-cultural slop becoming strangely enjoyable, and life becoming one's own again as time keeps rolling.

motifMap.meaning: Time is felt as returning and disappearing at once, a small rhythm of ordinary life becoming available again.
Derivative pop culture becomes both horrible and glorious, accepted as part of the day's living texture.
The post closes by treating disappearance not as crisis but as the trace of days actually inhabited.

excerpt: But time rolls on the days disappear.  Even as they are pleasantly lived

editHistory.notes: Manual live feed extraction performed with user permission. Classified from the actual post text as The Candle's Glow with Early / Domestic variant because the piece locates renewed life and time inside a small ordinary scene of music, bathroom solitude, and pleasantly disappearing days.

integrity.notes: Filename: 2026-06-09.days-disappear.phase-the-candles-glow.variant-early-domestic.metadata.v2.6.5.json. Body fingerprint validates against work/live-run/days-disappear.source.txt.
